recommendedActions: Immediately evacuate all residents of the affected Somasundarapalya tenement block to temporary shelter to ensure public safety
Install temporary shoring and structural bracing along the compromised load-bearing wall to prevent immediate collapse
Engage a structural engineering consultant to perform an ultrasonic pulse velocity test and a comprehensive crack pattern analysis
Seal off the building perimeter with barricades and warning signage to restrict unauthorized entry
Submit a formal condemnation notice and structural failure report to the BBMP Zonal Commissioner for emergency demolition or retrofitting authorization
dependencies: BBMP Revenue Department for occupant relocation and temporary housing arrangements
Bengaluru City Police for perimeter security and crowd management
BESCOM for emergency power disconnection to the tenement to prevent electrical hazards during potential collapse
BWSSB for isolating water supply lines connected to the structure to prevent soil saturation and additional settling
